zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen於1370年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯吉勒時，她的父親Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen37歲，母親Mathilde Fleming19歲。她於1403年與Sir Christopher Plunkett在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1441年3月4日在愛爾蘭享年71歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯登桑尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen于1370年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯吉勒时，她的父亲Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen37岁，母亲Mathilde Fleming19岁。她于1403年与Sir Christopher Plunkett在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1441年3月4日在爱尔兰享年71岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯登桑尼。

nameMeanings.name: Cusack
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aileen, Brigid, Eamon, Fergus, Seamus.

Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Cussac in Guienne, France, named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Cūcius or Cussius + the locative suffix -acum. The surname died out in England, but is common in Ireland, where it was imported at the time of the Anglo-Norman invasion in the 12th century. It has been Gaelicized as de Cíosóg.

variants.name: Cuzick
meanings: Irish and English (Worcestershire): variant of   Cusack  . This form of the surname is no longer found in Ireland and is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Cusick
meanings: Irish and Scottish: variant of   Cusack  , now found predominantly in Scotland.
Americanized form of Polish Kusik or Czech Kusík, Slovak Kúšik and Kušík.
Americanized form of Croatian Kusić, Croatian and Serbian Kušić (see Kusic ), or Serbian Ćušić (see Cusic ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen was born in 1370, in Killeen, County Meath, Ireland, her father, Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen, was 37 and her mother, Mathilde Fleming, was 19. She married Sir Christopher Plunkett in 1403, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 4 March 1441, in Ireland, at the age of 71, and was buried in Dunsany, County Meath, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen est née en 1370, à Killeen, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mathilde Fleming, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Christopher Plunkett en 1403, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 mars 1441, à Irlande, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunsany, County Meath, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen 1370 in Killeen, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen 37 und ihre Mutter Mathilde Fleming 19. Sie hat 1403 in Irland Sir Christopher Plunkett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. März 1441 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Irland und wurde in Dunsany, County Meath, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen è nata il nel 1370 nel Killeen, County Meath, Irlanda, sua padre, Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Mathilde Fleming, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir Christopher Plunkett nel 1403, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 4 marzo 1441, nel Irlanda, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunsany, County Meath, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeenが1370年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスキリーンで生まれた時，父Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeenは37歳，母Mathilde Flemingは19歳であった。1403年にアイルランドでSir Christopher Plunkettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1441年3月4日にアイルランドで71歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ メアスダンサニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen(이)가 1370년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 킬린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde Fleming(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1403년 아일랜드에서 Sir Christopher Plunkett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1441년 3월 4일 아일랜드에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 미스 던산이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen nasceu em 1370, em Killeen, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde Fleming, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Christopher Plunkett em 1403, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de março de 1441, em Irlanda, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunsany, County Meath, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen родилась в 1370 г. в местности киллин, коунти мит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde Fleming, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Christopher Plunkett в 1403 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 4 марта 1441 г. в местности Ирландия в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности дунсани, коунти мит, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Cusack 6th Lady of Killeen nació en 1370, en Killeen, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mathilde Fleming, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sir Christopher Plunkett en 1403, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1441, en Irlanda, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Dunsany, County Meath, Irlanda.
